intro: Sensor Tower is paid subscription; AppTweak is per-seat. Sensor Tower: App store intelligence platform with download estimates, revenue data, keyword rankings, and ad intelligence for mobile. AppTweak: ASO intelligence platform with keyword research, competitive benchmarking, App Store Connect data, and market share estimates. Sensor Tower fits mobile — in practice, mobile apps with subscriptions. AppTweak fits mobile — in practice, mobile apps with subscriptions. On our rubric Sensor Tower scores 3/5 for developer experience and 3/5 for transparency, while AppTweak scores 4/5 and 3/5. The honest trade-off: Sensor Tower's main drawback — Free apps without monetization; AppTweak's — Free apps without monetization. Sensor Tower is explicitly not the right pick for free apps without monetization. AppTweak is not aimed at free apps without monetization. Another Sensor Tower advantage: Paywall A/B testing. Another Sensor Tower friction point: Web-only products. Our read on Sensor Tower: best for mobile apps with subscriptions. Sensor Tower offers subscription. On AppTweak: best for mobile apps with subscriptions. AppTweak offers seat.
quick_take: Sensor Tower is for mobile; AppTweak is for mobile; decide on pricing model.
verdict_a: Choose Sensor Tower if your work looks like mobile apps with subscriptions, and if you accept tighter coupling in exchange for the managed surface.
verdict_b: Choose AppTweak if your work looks like mobile apps with subscriptions, and if per-seat pricing aligns with how your team grows.

faq.q: Is Sensor Tower cheaper than AppTweak?
faq.a: Sensor Tower uses paid subscription pricing; AppTweak uses per-seat. Which is cheaper depends on your volume and team size — model both against your projected usage before deciding.

faq.q: Can I migrate from Sensor Tower to AppTweak?
faq.a: Moving to AppTweak is reasonable on its side — it's low lock-in (ASO intel SaaS, exportable). The friction is on the way out of Sensor Tower, which is medium lock-in (Data exportable, but analytics sticky). Budget time for data export and integration rework.

faq.q: Which has better developer experience, Sensor Tower or AppTweak?
faq.a: AppTweak scores higher in our rubric (4/5 vs 3/5 for Sensor Tower). Transparency is 3/5 for AppTweak and 3/5 for Sensor Tower. DX scores are rubric-based, not benchmarks, so evaluate against your own toolchain.

faq.q: Is AppTweak a good alternative to Sensor Tower?
faq.a: They sit in the same category, so yes — AppTweak is a plausible alternative for many Sensor Tower use cases. It fits best when mobile. Skip it if free apps without monetization.
